data.body: FORCE_CLAIM: plan-review gate bypassed by user approval — no plan-review attestation was verified. Reason: "plan-review PASSED (signed, non-blocking) at origin/main 81a15f4d minutes ago; attestation staled only by this stack's own unrelated c366 commit advancing HEAD to 37ab727 (mechanical HEAD-freshness, not a plan change/BLOCK). Gate intent satisfied; claiming all before further commits.".
